lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੜਹਿ ਸੰਪੂਰਨਾ ਤਤੁ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਪੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: bed parreh sanpooranaa tat saar na pekhan |
lines.english: Those who read the Vedas in their entirety, still do not see the sublime essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟੁ ਦਰਸਨ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਨਹ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਭੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: khatt darasan bhramate fireh neh mileeai bhekhan |
lines.english: The followers of the six orders wander and roam around wearing religious robes, but they do not meet God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਾਇਣਾ ਸੇ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਲੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: varat kareh chandraaeinaa se kitai na lekhan |
lines.english: They keep the lunar fasts, but they are of no account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੀ ਸਿਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: bhekhee prabhoo na labhee vin sachee sikhan |
lines.english: They wear religious robes, but without the True Teachings, God is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲਕੁ ਕਢਹਿ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਾਲੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: tilak kadteh isanaan kar antar kaalekhan |
lines.english: They apply ceremonial marks to their foreheads, and take cleansing baths, but they are blackened within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਆਪਣਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਖੀ ਦੇਖੰ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: tin janam savaariaa aapanaa jin gur akhee dekhan |13|
lines.english: One who sees the Guru with his eyes, embellishes and exalts his human life. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲਾ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਸੋ ਪਵੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolaa maarag so pavai jis dhur masatak lekhan |
lines.english: One who had strayed, finds the Path again, if such pre-ordained destiny is written on his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ ਕੂੜਾਵੀ ਛਡਿ ਸੰਮਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਧਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaar koorraavee chhadd samal sach dhanee |1|
lines.english: Abandon your false actions, and meditate on the True Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਨਿਵਾਹੂ ਗਡਿ ਜੋ ਚਲਾਊ ਨ ਥੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: so nivaahoo gadd jo chalaaoo na theeai |
lines.english: Focus on that which will not pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਘਟਾਊ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: habh samaanee jot jiau jal ghattaaoo chandramaa |
lines.english: God's Light is permeating all, like the moon reflected in the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਗਟੁ ਥੀਆ ਆਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paragatt theea aap naanak masatak likhiaa |2|
lines.english: He Himself is revealed, O Nanak, to one who has such destiny inscribed upon his forehead. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਗਹ ਮੰਨੀਅਹਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak daragah maneeeh milee nithaave thaau |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the Court of the Lord, you shall be accepted; even the homeless find a home there. ||3||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖ ਸੁਹਾਵੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਉ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mukh suhaave naam chau aatth pehar gun gaau |
lines.english: One's face becomes beautiful, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and singing His Glorious Praises, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਸਭ ਫਿਰੈ ਨਿਕਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: eikas har jeeo baaharee sabh firai nikaamee |
lines.english: Without the One Dear Lord, all wander around aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰ ਭੇਖਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: baahar bhekh na paaeeai prabh antarajaamee |
lines.english: By wearing religious robes outwardly, God, the Inner-knower is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਿਉ ਨਿਤ ਗਰਬਿ ਫਿਰਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: man rataa kuttanb siau nit garab firaamee |
lines.english: Their minds are imbued with attachment to family, and so they continually wander around, puffed up with pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਹਿ ਗੁਮਾਨੀ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਕਿਆ ਗਰਬਹਿ ਦਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: fireh gumaanee jag meh kiaa garabeh daamee |
lines.english: The arrogant wander around the world; why are they so proud of their wealth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਖਿਨ ਜਾਇ ਬਿਲਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa naal na chalee khin jaae bilaamee |
lines.english: Their wealth shall not go with them when they depart; in an instant, it is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਚਰਦੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਮਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਹੁਕਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: bicharade fireh sansaar meh har jee hukaamee |
lines.english: They wander around in the world, according to the Hukam of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਾਮੀ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jo jan har kaa sevako har tis kee kaamee |14|
lines.english: That humble being, who serves the Lord, has his affairs resolved by the Lord. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਖੁਲਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: karam khulaa gur paaeaa har miliaa suaamee |
lines.english: When one's karma is activated, one finds the Guru, and through Him, the Lord and Master is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨਾ ਖਾਕੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਯਕੀਨਾ ਹਿਕ ਸਿਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tinaa khaak jinaa yakeenaa hik siau |1|
lines.english: Nanak is the dust of the feet of those who have faith in the One Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਹੁ ਅਲਾਏ ਹਭ ਮਰਣੁ ਪਛਾਣੰਦੋ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mukhahu alaae habh maran pachhaanando koe |
lines.english: All speak with their mouths, but rare are those one who realize death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਤਨਿ ਪੜਦਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tai tan parradaa naeh naanak jai gur bhettiaa |2|
lines.english: There is no obscuring veil on the body of that one, O Nanak, who meets the Guru. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣੁ ਵਸੰਦੋ ਮੰਝਿ ਪਛਾਣੂ ਕੋ ਹੇਕੜੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaan vasando manjh pachhaanoo ko hekarro |
lines.english: Know that He dwells within all; rare are those who realize this.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੜੀ ਕਾਂਢਕੁ ਆਹ ਪਾਵ ਧੋਵੰਦੋ ਪੀਵਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: matarree kaandtak aah paav dhovando peevasaa |
lines.english: I drink in the water which has washed the feet of those who share the Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂ ਤਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਅਥਾਹ ਪਸਣ ਕੂ ਸਚਾ ਧਣੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: moo tan prem athaah pasan koo sachaa dhanee |3|
lines.english: My body is filled with infinite love to see my True Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਚਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਤੈ ਖਿਸਕਿ ਜਾਇ ਬੋਲੇ ਸਭੁ ਕਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: bachan kare tai khisak jaae bole sabh kachaa |
lines.english: He gives his word, but then backs out. All that he says is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਨਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: aavai jaae bhavaaeeai bahu jonee nachaa |
lines.english: He comes and goes, and wanders, dancing in countless incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਰਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau naam visaariaa naal maaeaa rachaa |
lines.english: Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Fearless Lord, he becomes attached to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਰਵੈਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਝੂਠੇ ਲਾਲਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: vair kare niravair naal jhootthe laalachaa |
lines.english: He tries to take vengeance upon the Lord, who bears no vengeance; such a person is trapped by falsehood and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਥੋਥਾ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੁ ਕੂੜੀ ਸਭ ਖਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: andarahu thothaa koorriaar koorree sabh khachaa |
lines.english: The false person is hollow within; he is totally engrossed in falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਆ ਤਪਾਵਸੁ ਧਰਮ ਕਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਿ ਸਚਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: hoaa tapaavas dharam kaa naanak dar sachaa |15|
lines.english: Even-handed justice is administered, O Nanak, in the Court of the True Lord. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਿਆ ਸਚੈ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹਿ ਵੇਖਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: maariaa sachai paatisaeh vekh dhur karamachaa |
lines.english: The True King, the Primal Lord God, kills him when He sees what he has done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਦੂਤੀ ਹੈ ਹੇਰਿਆ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਪਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: jamadootee hai heriaa dukh hee meh pachaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death sees him, and he rots away in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਭਾਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: parabhaate prabh naam jap gur ke charan dhiaae |
lines.english: In the early hours of the morning, chant the Name of God, and meditate on the Feet of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam maran mal utarai sache ke gun gaae |1|
lines.english: The filth of birth and death is erased, singing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਅੰਧਾਰੀ ਅੰਧੁ ਸੁੰਞੀ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: deh andhaaree andh sunyee naam vihooneea |
lines.english: The body is dark, blind and empty, without the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਫਲ ਜਨੰਮੁ ਜੈ ਘਟਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਸਚੁ ਧਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak safal janam jai ghatt vutthaa sach dhanee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, fruitful is the birth of one, within whose heart the True Master dwells. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਇਣ ਲੋਈ ਡਿਠ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਬੁਝੈ ਮੂ ਘਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: loein loee dditth piaas na bujhai moo ghanee |
lines.english: With my eyes, I have seen the Light; my great thirst for Him is not quenched.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:
